issues.title: Make Guardrails User-Configurable
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-29

Make guardrails configurable by the user instead of keeping them fully hardcoded.

Expose the relevant validation and safety options through project settings.

issues.title: Make the Auto Strict-Validation Threshold Configurable
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-45

Make the automatic strict-validation threshold configurable so teams can tune when stricter validation should apply.

Store the threshold in project settings and use it during validation decisions.

issues.title: Cache the Base Strict-Validation Signature Across Repeated Runs
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-46

Cache the base strict-validation signature across repeated runs to avoid recomputing identical validation input.

Reuse the cached signature when the same base query and validation context appear again.

issues.title: Add CSV Export for Benchmark Results
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-30, ARSS-31

Add CSV export for benchmark results.

Include the benchmark fields needed for spreadsheet analysis and downstream processing.

issues.title: Add Colorized CLI Output with Configurable Palette
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-38, ARSS-39

Add colorized CLI output and allow the palette to be configured.

Keep the output readable when color is disabled or when different terminal themes are used.

issues.title: Add HTML and Markdown Benchmark Report Export
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-22

Add HTML and Markdown export for benchmark reports.

Allow a completed benchmark run to be rendered into shareable report files.

issues.title: Add a Progress Indicator for Long Benchmark Runs
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-32

Add a progress indicator for long benchmark runs.

Show enough progress information to make long executions easier to track from the CLI.

issues.title: Use Rich for Ranking Tables and CLI Rendering
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-40

Use Rich for ranking tables and general CLI rendering.

Apply it to improve table formatting and consistent terminal presentation.

issues.title: Add Stability Metrics to results.json
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-42

Add stability metrics to results.json.

Persist repeatability-oriented metrics alongside the existing benchmark result payload.

issues.title: Support Windows Authentication (Trusted Connection)
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-14

Support Windows Authentication (Trusted Connection) for SQL Server connections.

Allow the tool to connect without SQL username and password when the environment uses integrated auth.

issues.title: Add Docker Compose for SQL Server and ARSS
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-18

Add Docker Compose setup for SQL Server and AutoResearch SQL Server.

Make it easy to start a local benchmark environment with the app and database together.

issues.title: Add --no-cache-clear Flag for DBCC Control
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-19

Add a --no-cache-clear flag to control DBCC cache clearing.

Let benchmark runs skip cache clearing when the operator explicitly wants that behavior.

issues.title: Rotate Log Files with RotatingFileHandler
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-33

Rotate log files with RotatingFileHandler.

Prevent unbounded log growth while keeping recent run history available.

issues.title: Add Structured JSON Logging
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-35

Add structured JSON logging.

Emit machine-readable log records that are easier to index, search, and ingest.

issues.title: Introduce BenchmarkConnectionManager for Connection Lifecycle
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-41

Introduce BenchmarkConnectionManager to own connection lifecycle concerns.

Centralize connection setup, reuse, and teardown for benchmark execution.

issues.title: Add Experiment History Tracking
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-8

Add experiment history tracking.

Store enough metadata to review and compare past benchmark runs over time.

issues.title: Add Nightly Benchmark Runs
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-9

Add nightly benchmark runs.

Support scheduled execution so recurring performance baselines can be collected automatically.

issues.title: Persist Benchmark Results to a Database
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-10

Persist benchmark results to a database.

Store run outputs in a durable form that can be queried later.

issues.title: Build a Benchmark Dashboard
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-11

Build a benchmark dashboard.

Provide a UI or report surface for browsing benchmark history and comparing outcomes.

issues.title: Integrate Automated Query Optimization into CI/CD
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-13

Integrate automated query optimization into CI/CD.

Allow optimization and benchmark checks to run as part of the delivery pipeline.

issues.title: Add Schema-Aware INDEX Hint Suggestions
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-25

Add schema-aware INDEX hint suggestions.

Use available schema context to propose more relevant index hints during optimization.

issues.title: Support Triple Transformation Combinations
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-43

Support triple transformation combinations.

Allow the variant generator to compose three compatible transformations in one candidate.

issues.title: Add Stored Procedure Parsing and Optimization
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-26

Add stored procedure parsing and optimization.

Support extracting and optimizing SQL that originates from stored procedures.

issues.title: Add an Agent That Analyzes Execution Plans
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-6

Add an agent that analyzes execution plans.

Use the plan analysis to surface optimization guidance during benchmark review.

issues.title: Add an Agent That Suggests Indexes
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-7

Add an agent that suggests indexes.

Use benchmark context and SQL analysis to propose candidate indexes.

issues.title: Add LLM-Assisted SQL Variant Generation
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-12

Add LLM-assisted SQL variant generation.

Use an LLM to suggest additional SQL rewrites that can be benchmarked safely.

issues.title: Migrate Project Metadata and Tooling to pyproject.toml
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-23

Migrate project metadata and tooling to pyproject.toml.

Move supported packaging and tool configuration into a single modern project file.

issues.title: Move Generator Hyperparameters to settings.yaml
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-24

Move generator hyperparameters to settings.yaml.

Keep the variant generator's tunable settings in configuration instead of hardcoded values.

issues.title: Model Benchmark Result Payloads with TypedDict or Dataclass
issues.body:
Original backlog IDs: ARSS-44

Model benchmark result payloads with TypedDict or Dataclass.

Give result structures an explicit typed shape to reduce ad hoc dictionaries.
